sentiment.reasoning: A 12% margin improvement is a strong indicator of increased operational efficiency and profitability.

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns poses immediate financial and reputational risks to the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
